name: Ringover Cloud Business Phone API
what_it_does: Cloud business phone system with REST API — providing VoIP calling, SMS, call recording, IVR, call analytics, and deep CRM integrations for sales and support teams, with power dialer for outbound sales, real-time call coaching (listen/whisper/barge), and 50+ country virtual phone numbers.
use_cases: Logging calls and SMS automatically to CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) via Ringover API
Querying call recordings, transcripts, and analytics for quality assurance and coaching
Managing Ringover virtual numbers, IVR flows, and routing rules via REST API
Triggering click-to-call actions from CRM or web app using Ringover API integration
Pulling team call performance metrics for sales leader reporting dashboards
not_for: High-volume predictive dialing (use Readymode or Connect-and-Sell for mass outbound)
Enterprise contact center with complex routing (use Genesys or Talkdesk for enterprise CCaaS)
SMS marketing campaigns (use Attentive or Klaviyo for SMS marketing automation)
best_when: A sales or support team needs a European-friendly cloud phone system with deep CRM integration, call coaching features (listen/whisper/barge), and multi-country virtual numbers — without enterprise CCaaS complexity.
avoid_when: You need high-volume predictive dialing, complex contact center routing, or enterprise SLA requirements beyond what a cloud phone provider offers.

auth.notes: API key from Ringover dashboard. OAuth2 for CRM integrations. Bearer token auth. Team-scoped access. Webhook for call events, SMS events, and voicemail. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zendesk) via native connectors. 50+ country virtual numbers available. Call recording stored in Ringover cloud.

pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2018. Raised $30M+ Series B (2022). Backed by Idinvest, Breega. European cloud phone leader competing with Aircall. 10,000+ customers across Europe and North America. Power Dialer feature for outbound sales. Real-time coaching (listen/whisper/barge). AI call transcription and sentiment analysis. Strong in French, Spanish, UK markets.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for calls, SMS, users, numbers, and analytics. API key and OAuth2 auth. Good API documentation. Webhook for real-time call events. CRM integrations native. Call recording access via signed URLs. Power Dialer included in Business plan. IVR configuration via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Call reads fully idempotent. SMS reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period. Outbound call initiation not idempotent — check call log before retrying.
known_agent_gotchas: Call recording access via time-limited signed URLs — do not cache URLs
Power Dialer requires Business plan — not available on Smart tier
GDPR call recording consent notification required in EU countries
IVR configuration via API requires understanding of Ringover flow model
Virtual number provisioning varies by country — some require identity verification

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001 compliant. EU and US data residency. API key and OAuth2 auth. Call recording data is sensitive — access via signed URLs with expiry. GDPR consent for call recording required in applicable countries. French company with GDPR-first design. Whisper/barge coaching requires careful access control.
